rulings.Case Title: CAROL BLUMENFELD SACHAL VS. JUAN DE DIOS RODRIGUEZ-PINA BLANCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Referees Partition Accounting Report And Recommendation For Distribution Of Sale Proceeds
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 13, 2017 line 1. OTHER AMY HARRINGTON's Motion To Approve Referee's Partition Accounting Report And Recommendation For Distribution Of Sale Proceeds GRANTED. The Partition Accounting Report is approved. The distribution of funds shall be made in accordance with the report. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WALTER YEE et al VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 13, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to January 12, 2018 on Court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLART LLC VS. JIMMY YANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Order For Sale Of Real Property And Dwelling
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 13, 2017 line 3. Order To Show Cause Re: Order For Sale Of Real Property And Dwelling OFF CALENDAR. No proper Proof of Service on the judgment debtor on file. CRC 3.1300. Attorney declaration that service was "caused" is not sufficient. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NICOLAS GONZALEZ VS. VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 13, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 5TH AMENDED COMPLAINT Overruled, 10 days to answer. Fifth Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for breach of fiduciary duty against the moving defendant. Defendant failed to comply with CRC 2.107 and 2.108, this non-compliance resulted in an oversized brief. Therefore, pages 16-20 of the demurrer are stricken. In the future, failure to comply with CRC will result in the briefs being stricken in their entirety. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 13, 2017 line 5. Settlememt Hearing GRANTED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OREGON MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. BRUCE I. GILBERT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-559510, CGC-17-559659, CGC-17-561009, CGC-17-561970 WITH CASE CGC-17-558782
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 13, 2017 line 8. PLAINTIFF OREGON MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-559510, CGC-17-559659, CGC-17-561009, CGC-17-561970 WITH CASE CGC-17-558782 GRANTED in part. Motion is denied as to CGC-17-559510 as it has been dismissed. Motion is otherwise granted. No opposition filed. Cases to be consolidated for all purposes. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN YUDOWITZ VS. MART BAILEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion To Compel Response To Defendant'S Form Interrogatories, Request For Admissions, And Request For Production Of Documents; And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 13, 2017 line 10. DEFENDANT MART BAILEY's MOTION to Compel Response To Defendant'S Form Interrogatories, Request For Admissions, And Request For Production Of Documents; And Request For Monetary Sanctions Continued to January 8, 2018 and transferred to Department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. This case was an unlawful detainer at the time the discovery was served (and subject to special rules) and at the time the motion was filed. However, this is a regular civil matter now and discovery motion will be heard per CCP 1005. Opposition and reply papers to be filed and served in accordance with CCP 1005. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN YUDOWITZ VS. MART BAILEY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 13, 2017 line 10. DEFENDANT MART BAILEY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OFF CALENDAR per December 11, 2017 ex-parte order. = (501/REQ)
